case_title: STEVEN NICHOLS VS. PRESIDIO ELECTRIC, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF NICHOLS, STEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT PRESIDIO ELECTRIC, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NICHOLS, STEVEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRESIDIO ELECTRIC, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $5,949.19 PRINCIPAL, $71.79 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,245.98, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF NICHOLS, STEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT PRESIDIO ELECTRIC, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
